list.latex: G_{items}=G_{A}\cdot G_{B}\cdot G_{C}\cdot G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}

f_{getCoord}(d)=[\operatorname{floor}((d-1)/(G_{B}\cdot G_{C}\cdot G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{B}\cdot G_{C}\cdot G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/(G_{C}\cdot G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{C}\cdot G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/(G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{D}\cdot G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/(G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{E}\cdot G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/(G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{F}\cdot G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/(G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))+1,\operatorname{floor}(\operatorname{mod}((d-1),(G_{G}\cdot G_{H}))/G_{H})+1,\operatorname{mod}((d-1),G_{H})+1]
